name: community_mod_ai_hate_speech_context_error
premise: A social platform deploys an AI moderation model to remove hate speech at scale. Audit samples show the model removes reclaimed slurs used in support groups and misses coded threats in local dialects. Trust lead Clara Jensen can tighten filters to reduce threats, which will increase false removals and silence marginalized communities, or loosen filters to preserve speech, which may allow harassment to spread. A new law imposes heavy fines for 'failure to remove' illegal hate speech within 24 hours, but it also requires due-process for users. Advertisers threaten to leave after a viral harassment incident. Clara must set the policy by tomorrow. External scrutiny from regulators and community observers has intensified because the outcome could redefine expectations in Technology.

agents.name: Clara Jensen
agents.identity: I am the trust and safety lead responsible for moderation policy when models misread context and enforcement changes reshape who feels safe online.
agents.goal: I want to reduce harassment without turning automation into a blunt tool that disproportionately silences the people it is supposed to protect.

agents.name: Advocate Malik Johnson
agents.identity: I am a community advocate representing groups harmed both by online harassment and by overbroad moderation that erases support spaces.
agents.goal: I want context-aware enforcement and meaningful appeals so safety does not come at the cost of voice and belonging.

choices: I will tighten removal for high-risk threat patterns and add a rapid appeal and human review lane for support-group contexts, accepting higher cost to balance safety and voice.
I will loosen automated removals and focus on reactive human enforcement to avoid silencing support groups, accepting higher exposure to harassment to preserve speech and context.
forced_choice.call_to_action: Legal deadlines and community harm are both escalating. Clara Jensen must choose between tighter automated enforcement with strong appeals or looser automation to preserve context at the cost of higher harassment exposure. What does Clara Jensen do?
